title: Replace placeholder public details
body: The current phone, email, and legal copy are placeholders for concept review. Confirm the real editorial or organisational owner before launch.

title: Upload final artwork
body: The seeded SVGs establish tone only. Replace them with commissioned illustration, photography, or archive images once the real brand direction is approved.

title: Define publishing rhythm
body: Use the current cards and sections as placeholders for essays, audio, events, or parish notes, then rename them once the final editorial plan is clear.
